response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and confirmed it's a concert trailer/clip featuring the song 'Flashpoint' by ReGLOSS. 2. Identified the song title as 'Flashpoint' and the performer as 'ReGLOSS'. 3. Searched for 'Flashpoint ReGLOSS lyrics'. 4. Located the full lyrics on Namu.wiki. 5. Translated/Verified the lyrics for the reference field. 6. Constructed the final JSON.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional clip for ReGLOSS's 1st Live concert, featuring the title track 'Flashpoint'. The performers are the members of the hololive group ReGLOSS.

scenes.description: The video begins with a dance performance by the four members of ReGLOSS on a stage, with the song 'Flashpoint' playing throughout. The video ends with a static promotional screen for the concert.

ある人は美しいとぼやいた
この地球の横顔は
どう見えてる？キミの世界では
現実を逆さまにして
失くしそうなモノだけ振り落とした ah
手のひらで拾い上げようとしたら
指の隙間すり抜け消えてった
"形あるものだけが
すべてじゃないけど

どうしても欲しいよ"
この世界を (da-ra-da)
変えることは (la-la-la-la)
きっとできないけど (da-ra-da)
キミの中の世界なら変えられるはず
芽吹いて咲いて実って枯れて
何ひとつ欠かせないから (da-ra-da-da)
最後にキミが笑ってくれれば
もうそれだけでいい
言葉の綾を紡ぐ人 優しさを編む人
それぞれの正義を解ってあげたい
絡まった矛盾と辻褄合わせ
そんな刹那を抱え今日を生きてる
分け合った灯り 隣から隣へ
やがてひとつに 夜の帳へ
息を吹き込んだ
キミとじゃなきゃだめなんだ ah
このまま寝てしまうには
もったいないほど
優しさに包まった
夜だった
はっきり浮かび上がった夢の輪郭
それは確かに愛だった
ツキが見守る今夜 そっと一瞬を抱き締めた
煌めく星
色や形 温度や意味
まるで何もかも違うボクらだけど
きっと最後には
この音で繋がってる
この世界を (da-ra-da)
変えることは (la-la-la-la)
きっとできないけど (da-ra-da)
キミの中の世界なら変えられるはず
芽吹いて咲いて実って枯れて
何ひとつ欠かせないから (da-ra-da-da)
最後にキミが笑ってくれれば
もうそれだけでいい
I'll always be by your side.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Paper flower petals,
Some people whispered they were beautiful.
What does this side profile of the Earth
Look like? In your world,
I turned reality upside down,
And shook off only the things I was about to lose, ah.
When I tried to pick them up with my palm,
They slipped through the gaps in my fingers and disappeared.
'It's not that things with form are
Everything, but
I want things with form
No matter what.'
This world (da-ra-da)
I cannot change (la-la-la-la)
I surely cannot (da-ra-da)
But if it's the world inside you, I should be able to change it.
Sprouting, blooming, bearing fruit, and withering,
Since not a single thing can be missing (da-ra-da-da),
If you smile for me in the end,
That alone is enough.
People who weave the nuances of words, people who knit kindness,
I want to understand each person's justice.
Untangling contradictions and making ends meet,
I live today holding onto such fleeting moments.
Sharing the light, from one neighbor to the next,
Eventually, it becomes one, beyond the veil of night.
I breathed life into it,
It has to be with you, ah.
It was a night wrapped in such kindness,
That it was almost a waste
To just fall asleep like this.
The outline of a dream that emerged clearly,
It was certainly love.
Under the moonlight tonight, I quietly embraced the moment.
Twinkling stars.
Even though we are completely different
In color, shape, temperature, and meaning,
I'm sure that in the end,
We are connected by this sound.
This world (da-ra-da)
I cannot change (la-la-la-la)
I surely cannot (da-ra-da)
But if it's the world inside you, I should be able to change it.
Sprouting, blooming, bearing fruit, and withering,
Since not a single thing can be missing (da-ra-da-da),
If you smile for me in the end,
That alone is enough.
I'll always be by your side.
